models.title: Kichler Kennewick 9.75 in. Wall Sconce, Black
source_fields:
Kichler Kennewick Wall Sconce — BlackThe Kichler Kennewick Wall Sconce, MPN 55085BK, showcases a transitional style with a sleek black finish. Crafted from durable steel, this fixture measures 9.75 in. in height and 4.75 in. in width, with a 6.55 in. extension from the wall. It accommodates one light, making it a versatile addition to various interior settings.Key Features

Finish: The fixture is finished in a modern black, enhancing its aesthetic appeal.

Dimensions: Overall dimensions are 9.75 in. height, 4.75 in. width, and 6.55 in. depth.

Light Source: Requires one E26 medium base bulb, with a maximum wattage of 75W.

Mounting: Suitable for wall mounting with both upward and downward installation options.

Material: Constructed from robust steel for durability.

Voltage: Operates on a standard 120V electrical system.

Installation: Includes a 6 in. lead wire for easy installation.

Weight: Lightweight design at 1.75 lbs for easy handling and installation.
Core Design & AestheticThe Kennewick Wall Sconce features a transitional design that blends seamlessly with various decor styles. Its black finish and steel construction provide a modern yet timeless look, suitable for damp locations.Light Source & Bulb InformationThis fixture requires one E26 medium base bulb, supporting up to 75W. Bulbs are not included, allowing for customization based on lighting needs.Dimensions & AdjustabilityThe sconce measures 9.75 in. in height and 4.75 in. in width, with a 6.55 in. extension. It is adaptable for both upward and downward installation.Installation & ElectricalDesigned for hardwired installation, the fixture operates on a 120V system. It is not dimmable, ensuring consistent illumination.Where This Fixture Works Best
Hallways
Bathrooms
Living Rooms
Bedrooms
What's Included6 in. lead wire

models.title: Kichler Kennewick 9.75 in. Wall Sconce, Brushed Nickel with Clear Satin Etched Glass

It accommodates one light, making it a versatile choice for various interior settings.Key Features

Overall Dimensions: Height of 9.75 in., width of 4.75 in., and extension of 6.55 in. from the wall.

Finish: Brushed nickel finish enhances modern and transitional decor.

Glass: Clear satin etched glass offers a soft, diffused lighting effect.

Material: Constructed from durable steel for longevity.

Bulb Requirement: Uses one E26 medium base bulb, max 75W, not included.

Mounting Options: Can be installed with glass facing up or down for flexible lighting design.

Voltage: Operates on standard 120V electrical systems.

Installation: Designed for wall mount installation, suitable for damp locations.
Core Design & AestheticThis wall sconce features a transitional design, blending modern and classic elements with its brushed nickel finish and clear satin etched glass. The fixture's steel construction ensures durability, while its damp rating makes it suitable for various indoor environments.Light Source & Bulb InformationThis fixture requires one E26 medium base bulb with a maximum wattage of 75W. Bulbs are not included, allowing you to choose the light output that best suits your space.Dimensions & AdjustabilityThe sconce measures 9.75 in. in height and 4.75 in. in width, with a 6.55 in. extension from the wall. It includes a 6 in. lead wire for installation flexibility.Installation & ElectricalThis wall sconce is designed for hardwired installation on 120V systems. models.title: Kichler Shailene 8.25 in. Wall Sconce, Natural Brass
source_fields:
Kichler Shailene Wall Sconce — Natural Brass & Clear Satin Etched GlassThe Kichler Shailene wall sconce, MPN 45572NBR, embodies a transitional style with its natural brass finish and steel construction. This fixture measures 8.25 in. in height and 5 in. in width, extending 6.25 in. from the wall. It requires one light, making it a versatile choice for various settings. The sconce is designed with a clear satin etched glass that complements its farmhouse and transitional aesthetic.Key Features

Overall Dimensions: Height of 8.25 in., width of 5 in., and depth of 6.25 in.

Finish: Natural brass finish enhances the sconce's classic appeal.

Material: Constructed from durable steel for longevity.

Glass Type: Clear satin etched glass provides a soft, diffused light.

Light Source: Requires one E26 medium base bulb, max 100W, not included.

Dimmable: Compatible with dimmer switches for customizable lighting.

Mounting Options: Can be installed with glass facing up or down.

Voltage: Operates on standard 120V electrical systems.

Wire Length: Includes a 6 in. lead wire for installation flexibility.

Installation: Designed for interior use in damp-rated locations.
Core Design & AestheticThe Shailene wall sconce features a transitional design that blends farmhouse charm with modern elegance. Its natural brass finish and clear satin etched glass create a warm and inviting ambiance. Suitable for damp locations, this fixture is perfect for bathrooms and other interior spaces.Light Source & Bulb InformationThis fixture requires one E26 medium base bulb with a maximum wattage of 100W. Bulbs are not included, allowing you to choose the light output and color temperature that best suits your needs.Dimensions & AdjustabilityThe sconce measures 8.25 in. in height, 5 in. in width, and extends 6.25 in. from the wall. It can be mounted with the glass facing up or down, providing flexibility in design and installation.Installation & ElectricalThis wall sconce is hardwired and operates on a standard 120V electrical system. It is dimmable when used with compatible dimmer switches, offering adjustable lighting levels to suit your preferences.Where This Fixture Works Best
Bathrooms
Hallways
Living Rooms
Bedrooms
What's Included
6 in. lead wire
Mounting hardware

models.title: AFX Cole 18" LED Wall Sconce, Black Finish
source_fields:
AFX Cole LED Wall Sconce — Black & White Acrylic DiffuserThe AFX Cole COLS0518L30D1BK is a contemporary modern LED wall sconce featuring a black finish and a white acrylic diffuser. It measures 18 in. in height and 5 in. in width, making it ideal for hallways, entrances, or any area requiring general lighting. The integrated LED module provides 1060 lumens at a 3000K color temperature, ensuring efficient and bright illumination.Key Features

Construction: Made from durable extruded aluminum for longevity.

Finish Options: Available in black, gold, or satin nickel finishes.

Diffuser: White acrylic diffuser ensures even light distribution.

Mounting: Can be mounted horizontally or vertically to suit your design needs.

Dimensions: 18 in. height, 5 in. width, 2.5 in. extension from the wall.

Electrical: Operates on 120V AC, 60 Hz power supply.

Dimming: Compatible with TRIAC and ELV dimmers for customizable lighting.

LED Performance: Integrated LED provides 1060 delivered lumens with a 3000K CCT and 90 CRI.

Certification: cETLus listed for indoor damp locations, ADA compliant, and Title 24/JA8 compliant.

Warranty: Backed by a 5-year limited warranty for peace of mind.
Core Design & AestheticThis sconce embodies a transitional style with its sleek black finish and minimalist design. The white acrylic diffuser provides a soft glow, making it suitable for both residential and commercial settings. It is ADA compliant and rated for damp locations, ensuring versatility in placement.Integrated LED IlluminationThe fixture features an integrated LED light source, delivering 1060 lumens at 3000K with a 19W power consumption. The LED is rated for 50,000 hours of use, providing long-lasting and energy-efficient lighting.Dimensions & AdjustabilityThe sconce measures 18 in. in height and 5 in. in width, with a 2.5 in. extension from the wall. It can be mounted in either a horizontal or vertical orientation, offering flexibility in installation.Installation & ElectricalThis fixture is designed for hardwired installation and operates on a 120V power supply. It includes standard mounting hardware and is compatible with residential TRIAC and ELV dimmers.Where This Fixture Works Best
Hallways
Entrances
Living Rooms
Commercial Spaces
Hospitality Areas
What's IncludedMounting hardware
